description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a combination of brick and horizontal siding on the exterior walls. The house features a prominent covered front porch supported by columns, with two cars parked in a driveway beneath a black gable roof. The upper floor includes a spacious balcony with outdoor seating, accessible from the interior, and several large windows providing ample natural light. Mature trees are positioned around the property, enhancing its residential and inviting appearance. The rear of the house includes a patio area and a secondary entrance, while the overall structure is rectangular with a mix of traditional and modern design elements.
description: A two-story suburban house with brick and siding, a covered front porch, balcony, and driveway with parked cars.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick lower level, gray siding upper level, and a covered patio area with trees nearby.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the upper balcony with outdoor seating, large windows, and a tree-lined backyard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the driveway, carport, and a tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway with a covered porch, two parked cars, and prominent columns.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, steps, and a central door beneath a gable roof
